name: Workable
tagline: AI-powered recruiting and HR software for growing companies
description: Workable combines applicant tracking with AI-powered sourcing and HR management tools. Its AI features include automated candidate sourcing from 400M+ profiles, one-click job posting to 200+ boards, AI-assisted job descriptions, and intelligent candidate recommendations. Workable is designed for small to mid-sized businesses that need powerful recruiting without enterprise complexity.
pros: Easy to set up and use
